description: Powers Claude — the AI you talk to in Claude Code and Mission Control
notes: Confirmed in ~/.zshrc and .env.local. Fallback model: claude-sonnet-4-6.

description: Powers TurboDot (your main agent) and handles image generation and voice transcription
notes: Primary model: gpt-5.4. Also used for gpt-4o fallback, image gen, and Whisper API skill.

description: Your direct line into Microsoft 365 — reads and sends Outlook email, accesses OneDrive files, and manages your calendar
source: Azure Entra → App registrations → M365 AI
notes: Tenant: Cutillo Consulting (mike@mikecutillo.com). Scopes: Mail.ReadWrite, Mail.Send, Files.ReadWrite, Calendars.ReadWrite, User.Read. Token cache: m365-dashboard/utils/.token_cache.json

description: Google's AI model — available as an alternative brain for your agents
notes: Key confirmed in openclaw.json models.providers.google. Also accessible via gemini-cli.

description: Authorizes your 3 Google accounts — lets agents read Gmail and manage Google Drive without a password each time
notes: 3 authorized accounts: cutillo.json, erincutillo.json, erinrameyallen.json. Scopes: Gmail full access, Drive full access.

description: The central nervous system of your whole system — routes messages between you, your agents, and all your tools
notes: Binds to loopback + Tailscale (100.94.2.117). Rate limit: 10/60s. Port 18789.

description: How TurboDot listens and responds inside your Discord server
notes: Allowlist mode — responds to approved user ID 338165373172187137 only. Guild policy: allowlist.

description: Schedules your social media posts — queues things up for LinkedIn and other platforms
notes: GraphQL only — old REST API (api.bufferapp.com/1) is deprecated. Org: 69b7382c (Charlies Org). Channel: 69b73c05 (Charles Sacco LinkedIn). Queue posts 7+ days out as safety buffer for review.

description: Automation glue that used to connect Buffer publishing — now archived
notes: ARCHIVED: Integration deleted 2026-03-22 when Buffer v1 REST API was deprecated. The Make.com → Buffer pipeline no longer exists. Kept here for historical reference.

description: Gives TurboDot a voice — converts text to spoken audio
notes: Confirmed in openclaw.json talk config. Voice ID: EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL. Model: eleven_turbo_v2_5.

description: Lets your agents read and write to your Notion databases
notes: Integration: OpenClawSpace. Workspace: Mike's Space. Token updated 2026-04-12. Unified sync supports 5 sources. Requires NOTION_PARENT_PAGE_ID for first-time database creation.

description: Lets your agents search the web without relying on Google
notes: Enabled as the default web search plugin for all agents in openclaw.json.

description: Web scraping — lets agents pull data from websites that don't have their own API
Controls your smart lights from code or agents
source: openhue-cli installed, bridge not yet registered
notes: openhue-cli is installed (brew) but the Hue bridge hasn't been registered. Run: openhue configure to set up.

description: Runs AI models locally on your Mac Mini — no internet required, no API costs
notes: OpenAI-compatible API at localhost:1234. Active model: Qwen 3.5 9B (cheap/default lane). Requires LM Studio desktop app to be running.

description: Lets your agents pull live posts and search X/Twitter for research and news feeds
usedBy: Mission Control news feed (falls back to cached seed data when absent)
notes: Add X_BEARER_TOKEN to mission-control/.env.local to enable live X posts in the news feed. Falls back to data/x-seed.json. Cache TTL: 2 hours. Check /api/x-status to verify.

description: Lets agents open a real browser to take screenshots, test pages, and verify UI without you lifting a finger
notes: Installed as npm dev dependency in mission-control. Also used in workspace-shared/qa/ (@playwright/test ^1.58.2).
